final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing digital art illustration of a deep-sea fantasy world featuring an ancient underwater civilization.

Style/medium: digital painting, highly detailed fantasy illustration, concept art style with intricate environmental storytelling
Composition: wide establishing shot, eye-level perspective, deep depth of field with layered depth from foreground ruins to distant darkness
Subject: mermaid princess in ancient attire examining a mysterious rune-covered stone tablet at center, surrounded by colossal stone pillars and arches overgrown with coral and sea anemones
Scene/backdrop: ancient submerged city ruins thousands of meters below sea level, bioluminescent glow illuminating the structures, giant jellyfish emitting blue-purple fluorescence, transparent deep-sea fish with self-illuminating organs, giant octopus tentacles emerging from distant darkness
Lighting/mood: bioluminescent light sources creating scattered points of glow against deep blue-black darkness, mysterious and dreamlike atmosphere
Color palette: deep blue-black as base, accented with bioluminescent cyan-green, purple, and golden light points scattered throughout
Materials/textures: weathered ancient stone with coral encrustation, translucent jellyfish bells, iridescent fish scales, glowing organic textures
Avoid: 8K stuffer aesthetic, photorealistic rendering, deformed anatomy, oversaturated neon colors, watermark
